name: Khan VS Kahn
short_description: Khan VS Kahn is a turn-based strategy game where two races compete over one city by achieving one of the 5 victory types Find out how to play and find the secret ending or challenge a friend in a 1v1 Duel. You can use your enemy's building, but be careful, he can use yours!
detailed_description:
Warning : This game is built like a puzzle game where you have to find out how to play by yourself and win.

You will be left without a tutorial and the goal is to find the secret true ending of the game.

or challenge a friend in a 1v1 Duel where only the smartest wins every time.

Two races compete over one city

Achieve one of the 5 victory types

You can use your enemy's building, but be careful, he can use yours!

A mix between European board games and sid meier's civilization

Which kind of victory are you going to achieve?

Modes :

- Hotseat against a friend

- Online Multiplayer with Steam Friend

- Against the AI (4 races to fight with increasing difficulty)
